cases.prompt: This diff has a bunch of AI-generated comments like '// now handles the new discount case' and '// added retry here' that just narrate the code. Clean up the redundant comments before we merge.
cases.notes: Cleaning up diff-narration comments is the core positive trigger for the skill.

cases.prompt: この変更について、コードコメントに書くべき内容とコミットメッセージに書くべき内容の違いを教えてください。
cases.notes: Asking what belongs in a comment vs. a commit message is a comment/commit-message content decision, in Japanese.

cases.prompt: Add Doxygen documentation comments to every declaration in sensor_driver.hpp, including the private members, with units and ranges.
cases.notes: Public-API/Doxygen documentation is a carved-out genre owned by code-readability, not comment-discipline.

cases.prompt: Fix the off-by-one error causing the retry loop to run one extra time under high latency.
cases.notes: A pure runtime bug fix with no comment, commit-message, or test-naming decision in scope does not trigger comment-discipline.
